reviews.comment:
No funcionaba el compresor para inflar las gomas del auto. El empleado tampoco estaba al tanto de su funcionamiento. No tenía descuento del club la nación más servicio club. No tenía líquido limpia parabrisas....

(Translated by Google)
The air compressor wasn't working. The employee didn't know how to operate it either. I didn't have the La Nación Plus Service Club discount. They were out of windshield washer fluid.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMXFUTFFREAE
